title: docmend product frontmatter (DR-005, adr-0011)
description: The YAML frontmatter docmend writes into converted product documents, validated after safe YAML parsing (duplicate keys rejected at parse time, C-006; date scalars preserved as strings so format assertions fire, adr-0011 rule 4). RQ-014 shape: required mechanical fields always present and non-null; optional fields are OMITTED, never null; Pandoc-recognized export fields at the root; docmend-owned mechanical data under the namespaced docmend/source/output objects. Controlled-vocabulary fields (genre/status/story_type/rating) validate as plain strings here — per-corpus vocabularies are injected externally and are deliberately not hardcoded in this public schema (OQ-007).

title.description: Required semantic field; v1 infers no titles, so a static 'Untitled' placeholder is legal (adr-0011 rule 2).

date.description: Prefer ISO 8601-compatible values; kept a plain string because partial dates ('2003') are legitimate for legacy documents.

deduplication.description: Populated by deferred WH-005 fuzzy-duplicate work; all fields optional until then.

id.description: Stable document identity surviving renames and rewrites (adr-0008); UUIDv7.

newline_style.description: Lowercase, matching the inventory newline census vocabulary.
